Consultant Ophthalmic Surgeon · Surrey & Berkshire

Clearer vision, expertly restored.

Miss Han Bin Lee is a Consultant Ophthalmic Surgeon specialising in cataract surgery and complex corneal conditions — combining digital precision with patient-centred care.

Complex Cataract Surgery Corneal Conditions Dry Eye YAG Laser Premium Lenses
Book a consultation Meet the consultant
Miss Han Bin Lee at ESCRS Bella Centre, Copenhagen, Denmark. 2025
Practising atFrimley, Parkside HospitalHeatherwood, Parkside HospitalBenenden Hospital
Specialist Services

Focused expertise across the anterior eye

Cataract surgery

Premium lens cataract surgery to restore clear, comfortable vision with rapid recovery.

Corneal conditions

Diagnosis and surgical treatment of complex corneal disease, including artificial cornea transplantation.

Dry eye management

Thorough assessment and tailored treatment plans for persistent dry and irritated eyes.

YAG laser capsulotomy

Quick, painless laser treatment for clouding that can occur after cataract surgery.

Ready to see more clearly?

Direct self-pay access — no GP referral required. Most major insurers accepted.

Book a consultation 07737 228 164
Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmologist specialising in cataract surgery and complex corneal conditions across the NHS and private practice.
